displayNameZh: 盾牌徽章逐层创建 Logo
summary: Logo Shield Crest component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的盾牌徽章逐层创建 Logo组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/logo-shield-crest/src/LogoShieldCrest.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `LogoShieldCrest` and `logoShieldCrestDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Logo Shield Crest Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/logo-shield-crest to my project. Preserve the exported LogoShieldCrestProps API and register the LogoShieldCrest composition with the default props.
